results.title: Top 3 AI crypto coins to buy ahead of the OpenAI and Anthropic IPOs
results.description: Top AI crypto coins have continued their uptrend and are outperforming Bitcoin and other tokens this year as the artificial intelligence boom gains momentum and as top companies like OpenAI and Anthropic launch their initial public offerings (IPOs). Anthropic filed its IPO papers on Monday, a few days after it completed its fundraising that valued it at $900 billion. Its filings came shortly after OpenAI made its submissions to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). These IPOs, as we have seen with space stocks, will likely lead to more gains among AI cryptocurrencies and stocks. This article looks at some of the best AI crypto coins to buy as the hype continues. Near Protocol (NEAR) Near Protocol token has already...

results.title: Israel, Hezbollah exchange fire after Trump announcement
results.description: BEIRUT (LEBANON) - Israel conducted strikes on south Lebanon and Hezbollah fired into northern Israel on Tuesday, after US President Donald Trump announced an agreement to halt attacks that neither side has publicly accepted.

results.title: CJ Sharma orders courts to clear old cases, crack down on irregularities
results.description: Kathmandu, June 2: Chief Justice Manoj Sharma has directed courts across the country to curb irregularities within the judiciary and ensure that no cases older than two years remain pending by the end of the current fiscal year. Issuing a written circular to the chief judges of high courts and district court judges, Sharma instructed [...] The post CJ Sharma orders courts to clear old cases, crack down on irregularities appeared first on Peoples' Review .

results.title: Telehealth Booms As Demand For GLP-1s Surges And Questions Mount About Safety, Oversight
results.description: Many telehealth companies have started offering GLP-1 medications for weight loss as demand has exploded. But certain medication errors tied to GLP-1s have exploded too, according to a KFF Health News review of Food and Drug Administration data.
